trending.title: New merger rules are no free ride for European champions, says Teresa Ribera
EU eyes tougher penalties for single market rule-breakers
trending.body: A draft joint declaration on One Europe, One Market Roadmap calls for Brussels to penalize foot-dragging by EU countries.

trending.title: EU says WhatsApp AI terms update fails to resolve antitrust concerns
trending.body: Commission finds that Meta’s proposal to charge fees for rival AI assistants on WhatsApp is “effectively equivalent” to an outright ban on access.

trending.title: EU hires former von der Leyen aide as top competition official
trending.body: Anthony Whelan fills key antitrust role after monthslong search.

trending.title: The EU’s Big Tech rulebook is shifting the digital economy, says Ribera
trending.body: Speaking at POLITICO’s European Pulse Forum, the EU’s top antitrust official pushed back against criticism that enforcement has been too slow.

regulatory.title: Online age checks are coming in Europe
regulatory.body: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen says the world’s biggest tech platforms have “no more excuses” for not checking users’ ages before letting them access restricted content.
